title: Unable to login with correct password
description: Customer reports that login fails even after entering the correct password. Reset link also not arriving.

title: Payment charged but order not confirmed
description: After completing payment, the order page shows pending and no confirmation email received.

title: Ticket attachment upload failing
description: Customer cannot upload PNG/JPG attachments. Upload button stays loading and then fails.

title: Mobile layout overlaps on checkout
description: On 425px devices, the checkout summary overlaps the address form and cannot scroll properly.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer is not receiving ticket update emails. Spam folder checked. Needs verification of email service.

title: Profile update shows success but data unchanged
description: User updates phone number and address. Toast shows success but refreshed profile still shows old data.

title: Search results missing recent tickets
description: Customer searches by ID and title but tickets created today are not appearing in results.

title: Slow dashboard loading on first visit
description: Dashboard takes 8-12 seconds to load on first visit. Needs optimization for initial bundle/data fetch.

title: Incorrect priority badge color
description: Priority badges show the wrong color mapping (High appears as green, Low appears as red).

title: Cannot mark ticket as resolved
description: When clicking Complete, the ticket stays in the in-progress list and resolved count does not increase.

title: Broken link in footer support email
description: Footer email link opens blank page instead of email client. Needs correct mailto formatting.

title: Toast notifications not showing on mobile
description: React-Toastify toasts appear on desktop but not visible on mobile view. Possibly z-index or container issue.
